name: conversation mode — after startPipeline, processMessage enters pipeline (state → IDEATION) (PHASE-16.1 regression guard)
description: RED (before D3): startPipeline absent → TypeError → state never transitions → FAIL. GREEN (after D3): startPipeline sets PIPELINE mode → next processMessage bypasses conversation gate → pipeline branch fires → active_runtime_state transitions to IDEATION → PASS.
